## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Breaking change

## Validation

- [ ] I tested locally
- [ ] I added/updated tests where needed
- [ ] I ran static/syntax checks

## User impact

<!-- What does the user see? Any migration needed? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or tokens committed
- [ ] Errors are handled with actionable messages
- [ ] Logs are useful and do not expose sensitive data
- [ ] README/docs updated if behavior changed
